requirement_topic.en: Electrical Installation and Wiring Rules — AS/NZS 3000 (EV Charging Circuits)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安装与布线规则——AS/NZS 3000（电动汽车充电回路）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安裝與布線規則——AS/NZS 3000（電動汽車充電迴路）

summary.en: EV charging circuit installations in Australia must comply with AS/NZS 3000:2018 (Wiring Rules — Electrical installations), the foundational Australian and New Zealand electrical installation standard. AS/NZS 3000 governs all fixed electrical wiring including dedicated EV charging circuits, specifying requirements for circuit protection (RCDs, circuit breakers), earthing arrangements, cable sizing, and installation methods. EV charging circuits must also comply with AS/NZS 3000 Appendix C (dedicated circuit requirements for EV supply equipment). A licensed electrical contractor must install EV supply equipment in Australia — self-installation by end users is not permitted in any state or territory.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚的电动汽车充电回路安装须符合AS/NZS 3000:2018（布线规则——电气装置），该标准为澳大利亚和新西兰的基础电气安装标准。AS/NZS 3000规范所有固定电气布线，包括专用电动汽车充电回路，规定了回路保护（RCD、断路器）、接地方式、电缆截面选择及安装方法的要求。电动汽车充电回路还须符合AS/NZS 3000附录C（电动汽车供电设备专用回路要求）。澳大利亚各州和地区均要求由持证电气承包商负责安装电动汽车供电设备，终端用户自行安装在任何州/地区均不被允许。
summary.zht: 澳大利亞的電動汽車充電迴路安裝須符合AS/NZS 3000:2018（布線規則——電氣裝置），該標準為澳大利亞和新西蘭的基礎電氣安裝標準。AS/NZS 3000規範所有固定電氣布線，包括專用電動汽車充電迴路，規定了迴路保護（RCD、斷路器）、接地方式、電纜截面選擇及安裝方法的要求。電動汽車充電迴路還須符合AS/NZS 3000附錄C（電動汽車供電設備專用迴路要求）。澳大利亞各州和地區均要求由持證電氣承包商負責安裝電動汽車供電設備，終端用戶自行安裝在任何州/地區均不被允許。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 3000:2018 — Wiring Rules — Electrical installations (Standards Australia / Standards New Zealand)
AS/NZS 3000 Appendix C — Dedicated circuit requirements for EV supply equipment
State and territory electrical safety legislation (e.g., Electrical Safety Act 2002 (Qld), Electricity Safety Act 1998 (Vic)) requiring licensed contractor installation

summary.en: China addresses EV charging installation through GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). These standards differ from AS/NZS 3000 in earthing system design (Chinese installations commonly use TN-C-S or TT systems under different assumptions), RCD requirements, and load management provisions. Chinese installation documentation and design codes are not accepted as evidence of compliance with Australian AS/NZS 3000.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）和GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准）处理充电安装事宜，由住房和城乡建设部（MOHURD）管理。上述标准在接地系统设计（中国安装通常在不同假设下采用TN-C-S或TT系统）、RCD要求及负荷管理规定方面与AS/NZS 3000存在差异。中国安装文件和设计规范不被接受作为符合澳大利亚AS/NZS 3000的证据。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）和GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準）處理充電安裝事宜，由住房和城鄉建設部（MOHURD）管理。上述標準在接地系統設計（中國安裝通常在不同假設下採用TN-C-S或TT系統）、RCD要求及負荷管理規定方面與AS/NZS 3000存在差異。中國安裝文件和設計規範不被接受作為符合澳大利亞AS/NZS 3000的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (MOHURD)

gap.en: Installation gap: EV charger products exported to Australia must be compatible with AS/NZS 3000 installation requirements, including: (1) the Australian 230 V / 50 Hz single-phase and 400 V three-phase supply system; (2) RCD protection requirements (Type A minimum for AC EVSE; charger manufacturers should declare RCD compatibility in product documentation); (3) AS/NZS 3000 earthing arrangement compatibility (MEN — Multiple Earthed Neutral — system used in Australia, differs from Chinese practice). Product documentation and installation manuals must reference AS/NZS 3000 requirements and must not describe installation procedures that conflict with Australian wiring rules. Importers/distributors are responsible for providing compliant AS/NZS 3000-compatible installation documentation.
gap.zh: 安装差距：出口澳大利亚的充电设备产品须与AS/NZS 3000安装要求兼容，包括：（1）澳大利亚230V/50Hz单相及400V三相供电系统；（2）RCD保护要求（交流EVSE至少须为A型；充电设备制造商应在产品文件中声明RCD兼容性）；（3）AS/NZS 3000接地方式兼容性（澳大利亚采用MEN——多点接地中性线系统，与中国实践不同）。产品文件及安装手册须参考AS/NZS 3000要求，不得包含与澳大利亚布线规则相冲突的安装程序。进口商/分销商须负责提供符合AS/NZS 3000的安装文件。
gap.zht: 安裝差距：出口澳大利亞的充電設備產品須與AS/NZS 3000安裝要求相容，包括：（1）澳大利亞230V/50Hz單相及400V三相供電系統；（2）RCD保護要求（交流EVSE至少須為A型；充電設備製造商應在產品文件中聲明RCD相容性）；（3）AS/NZS 3000接地方式相容性（澳大利亞採用MEN——多點接地中性線系統，與中國實踐不同）。產品文件及安裝手冊須參考AS/NZS 3000要求，不得包含與澳大利亞布線規則相衝突的安裝程序。進口商/分銷商須負責提供符合AS/NZS 3000的安裝文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AS/NZS 3000 is the mandatory wiring standard in all Australian states and territories; licensed contractor installation required by law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966-2014 / GB/T 51313-2018 under MOHURD; licensed electrician required

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AS/NZS 3000 is the mandatory electrical installation standard in Australia. EV chargers exported to Australia must be compatible with its 230/400 V system, RCD type requirements, and MEN earthing arrangement. Chinese GB 50966 / GB/T 51313 documentation does not satisfy AS/NZS 3000. Product installation manuals must be re-written for Australian conditions. Installation must be performed by a licensed Australian electrical contractor.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】AS/NZS 3000是澳大利亚强制性电气安装标准。出口澳大利亚的充电设备须与其230/400V系统、RCD类型要求及MEN接地方式兼容。中国GB 50966 / GB/T 51313文件不满足AS/NZS 3000要求。产品安装手册须针对澳大利亚条件重新编写，且安装须由持证澳大利亚电气承包商完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】AS/NZS 3000是澳大利亞強制性電氣安裝標準。出口澳大利亞的充電設備須與其230/400V系統、RCD類型要求及MEN接地方式相容。中國GB 50966 / GB/T 51313文件不滿足AS/NZS 3000要求。產品安裝手冊須針對澳大利亞條件重新編寫，且安裝須由持證澳大利亞電氣承包商完成。
